options.name: -attribute
options.description: turn on power attributes to be reported

options.name: -include_unit
options.description: define unit has to be reported or not

options.name: -nets
options.description: net list to get power attributes

options.name: -pg_net
options.description: rail Name, to get rail specific power attributes of instances

options.name: -pins
options.description: pin list to get power attributes

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: returns a tcl list of query objects and attributes
